build.description: Build and implement features for the Banking project

plan.description: Review and plan changes for the Banking project

review.description: Review code changes and PRs for the Banking project

build.template: Run npm run build and verify the build succeeds. Report any errors.

test.template: Run npm run test and report results. Show test coverage and any failures.

validate.template: Run npm run validate and report results. Focus on TypeScript errors, lint warnings, and test failures.
